---
title: CS336
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-07-17
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "assignment*/*.qmd"
  sort: order asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: cs336-llm-from-scratch
  description: "Stanford CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch"
---
